title: D5 075 realization integration support
core_theorem: deterministic dynamic bridge + current epsilon4 exactness + short-corner recurrence implies short-corner descent and unique canonical-clock descent by corner-time mod m
bridge_inputs: deterministic quotient pi:X->Q_A with induced successor G
visible short-corner recurrence on accessible bridge states
automatic_consequences: future short-corner hit times from one state have a unique residue mod m
canonical clock descends uniquely as T_Q-2 mod m
any bridge beta coordinate with correct drift and short-corner normalization equals the descended canonical clock
boundary_recurrence_equivalent: for dynamic bridge Q_A=(Z/m)xA with S={(m-2,delta):delta in C}, recurrence is equivalent to every forward T-orbit in A meeting C
normalization: always modulo m, never modulo the full bridge-component length
not_needed: prior exactness of short-corner or future event words
prior exactness of the canonical clock
remaining_open_items: uniform proof of dynamic bridge theorem
clean package for accessible boundary state space A
proof of short-corner recurrence on A
